quoted_or_paraphrased_text: In this regard, Ko et al. (2015) observed that participants who were assigned to a more powerful role in a negotiation game showed a lower and more monotone pitch than participants assigned to a less powerful role.
why_incorrect:
It is wrong because Ko et al found that they had higher pitch. 

"Speakers’ voices in the
high-rank condition had higher pitch, F(1, 156) = 4.48,
p < .05; "
